name: Africa Deep Tech Conference 2026
notes: Pan-African conference for builders, founders, funders, policymakers, and researchers. Covers AI, robotics, quantum computing, biotech, web3, XR. Speaker opportunities available. Strong fit for AI researcher + Solana builder profile.

name: Tech Revolution Africa 2026
deadline: Check website (event: Jan 30-31, 2026 - may have passed)
notes: Lagos, Nigeria at Landmark Event Center. Brings together founders, leaders, investors, government reps. Event date Jan 30-31 may have already passed - check for future editions.

name: Tech Unite Africa 2026
organization: Tech Unite Africa / Startup World Cup
amount: $1,000,000 investment prize (Startup World Cup Grand Finale)
notes: 3rd Nigeria Regional of Startup World Cup. Winner advances to Grand Finale in San Francisco for $1M investment. Panels on Fintech, AI, Cybersecurity, Cloud, Startup Growth.

name: Lagos Tech Fest 2026
notes: Annual Nigeria tech leadership event. C-level executives, government representatives, decision makers. Local Lagos event - easy to attend.

name: AfricaTech Conference 2026
notes: Nov 17-19, 2026 at Cape Town International Convention Centre. Major pan-African tech conference. Speaker CFP likely open mid-2026.

name: AI for Science Master's Program (AIMS / Google DeepMind)
notes: Fully funded 1-year residential master's combining AI/ML with science applications. 40 Google DeepMind Scholars. Strong fit for AI researcher profile.
